title: Finite Conditional Expectation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite conditional-expectation bad high-block QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite conditioning table where exact replay computes the high-block weighted average as 6 but the row claims high_block_expectation = 5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional conditional-expectation or tower-property rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep Radon-Nikodym construction, stopping-time theorems, and regular conditional probabilities in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite conditioning sigma-algebras as partitions of probability atoms.
Replay finite conditional expectations, total expectation, and tower-property witnesses by exact rational model evaluation.
Route false finite conditional-expectation tables through checked QF_LRA/Farkas certificates when the block-average contradiction is linear.
Keep general conditional expectation, Radon-Nikodym construction, martingales, stopping times, and regular conditional probabilities marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
